title: Living in Boulder vlog 11 - 13 - 2017: Started Castles & Cathedrals for Google Earth

enrichment.summary: Kyle records a late-night vlog at 2:37am describing his new project adding castles to a Google Earth timeline, where each castle links to photos and requires researching build dates from Wikipedia and other sources. He reflects on his work pace, risk of burnout, and plans for the coming month, including a possible future daily-video series about buildings.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Excited but finds it slow and tedious due to missing dates and spelling errors requiring extra research
Feels compelled to finish rather than abandon halfway, worries his work will lose value if it takes too long
Considering starting daily building/architecture videos but only after finishing current compilation work
Started random, switched to alphabetical; currently working through A countries like Austria
